reviews.comment:
Muy complicada la atención para comer en el lugar. Hay que hacer una fila para pagar un TKT sin saber exactamente que es lo que hay para almorzar o cenar y después recién ir a solicitarlo en mostrador, buscar mesa y esperar un almuerzo del cual ni siquiera pudiste ver el menú.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very complicated when eating there. You have to wait in line to pay for a TKT without knowing exactly what you'll get for lunch or dinner, and then go to the counter to order it, find a table, and wait for a lunch for which you didn't even get to see the menu.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnLXVXc2ZREAE
